title: Restore 'Get to Know Me' section format to previous draft

requirements.summary: Restore the 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section formatting on AboutPage.tsx to match the layout, typography, spacing, and visual styling from the draft prior to Draft 177
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section visually matches the layout and styling from the draft before Draft 177.
Heading style, typography, spacing, and any card or container formatting are restored.
The section content (text, structure) remains intact — only formatting is reverted.
No other sections on AboutPage.tsx are affected by this change.
The 'Wichtiger Hinweis' info box added in Draft 177 (below 'Mein Hintergrund') remains in place.

file_operations.description: Restore the 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section to its previous formatting by reverting any layout, typography, spacing, padding/margin, card styling, or decorative element changes introduced in Draft 177. Keep all text content unchanged. Preserve the 'Wichtiger Hinweis' info box that was added below 'Mein Hintergrund' section. Only modify the visual presentation of the 'Lernen Sie mich kennen' section itself.
